task_text: Flyer Studio marketing-agent architecture (rev3.1). Two clarifications: (1) exact source-preserving edits do NOT collapse into the textless-background path — they use the verified source-edit path or danger/manual-queue when impossible, never recreated-and-mislabeled; only new/source-inspired work uses textless-background+overlay. (2) raw-request spans are validation evidence only — deterministic code materializes a validated span into FlyerLockedFact(source=customer_text) before render; overlay never renders directly from skill-provided spans. Builds on rev3 (skill returns structure not fact-authority; deterministic required-fact-set; one creative brain; QA send-path migration; oracle send-rate to define; Hermes skills/plugins/prompt_builder research).
